creator: naylor.b.david@gmail.com
text:
kdesvn1 is the KDE4 version of kdesvn (a program I find very useful).

I chose the port name since v1.2 is the KDE4 series (and v1.0 is the KDE3 series).  Any suggestions?

I am not sure on the policy with PORTDOCS?  If it is an issue I could add it to the Makefile?

Portlint shows two issues:
  Lack of WITHOUT_NLS: it appears KDE4 does not have that support either, in which case it would be futile to support it
  Only one MASTER_SITE: kdesvn port also only has one master site.  I'm not aware of any official mirrors for kdesvn

Regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
